title: allium baeticum
intro: Allium baeticum, also known as Spanish garlic or baeticum, is a plant species in the garlic family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, which can help to combat infections and promote overall health. The health benefits of Allium baeticum include reducing inflammation, lowering cholesterol levels, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Allium baeticum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
